name: Jubilee School Jakarta

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Danau Sunter Utara, Sunter Agung, Jakarta Utara, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents say Jubilee is a sensible option for North Jakarta families who want Cambridge qualifications at a reasonable price.
paragraphs: Parents say Jubilee is a sensible option for North Jakarta families who want Cambridge qualifications at a reasonable price.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$3.1K – US$7.7K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Sunter campus, Science laboratories, Libraries, Sports facilities, Computer labs.
